title: Product Brief — Stage 1 (Post-Research)
description: Product brief enriched with findings from the Foundational Docs Pipeline (Stage 1).

category_niche.description: Category / niche label from Step 01 output. Source: STEP1_CONTENT header.

market_maturity_stage.description: Product lifecycle stage from Step 01 assessment. Source: STEP1_CONTENT market maturity section.

bottleneck.description: Primary conversion bottleneck identified in research. Source: STEP6_CONTENT bottleneck analysis.

competitor_count_validated.description: Number of validated competitors found. Source: count from STEP1_CONTENT.

primary_icps.description: Top 3 ideal customer profile descriptions. Source: STEP6_CONTENT ranked segments.
